stages.detail: MoveNet SinglePose Lightning is vendored as same-origin static assets before release.
stages.label: Build-time vendoring
stages.nextAction: Refresh assets only when the model version changes.

stages.detail: The exported app serves /models/movenet/singlepose/lightning/4/model.json and weight shards from the app origin.
stages.label: App delivery
stages.nextAction: Deploy the exported PWA after static asset checks pass.

stages.detail: The browser fetches model-assets.json and listed /models assets on first online launch or explicit warmup.
stages.label: First online launch
stages.nextAction: Open the PWA online once or use Warm model before going offline.

stages.detail: Offline analysis should wait until every model asset is cached and integrity checks pass when supported.
stages.label: Offline reuse
stages.nextAction: Warm and verify the model cache online before offline analysis.

summary.downloadTrigger: The model is vendored during build, then the browser downloads same-origin model assets on first online launch, service-worker install, or explicit warmup.
summary.nextAction: Open the PWA online once or use Warm model before going offline.
